model_output.summary: The video features two individuals running on treadmills simultaneously, which violates the single-subject requirement for AI face replacement.
reasons: Multiple dominant subjects in the frame make it impossible to isolate a single person for replacement.
The presence of two people performing the same action creates a conflict for AI face swapping tools.
The video does not meet the single-subject clarity requirement.
